# picker

```go
import "github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/components/picker"
```

Package picker provides a compact list popover for choosing one item from a slice of strings. Designed to layer above a parent TUI.

<a name="CancelledMsg"></a>
## type [CancelledMsg](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/components/picker/picker.go#L18>)

CancelledMsg fires when the user dismisses the picker with Esc.

```go
type CancelledMsg struct{}
```

<a name="Model"></a>
## type [Model](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/components/picker/picker.go#L22-L27>)

Model is a compact list popover. The caller supplies the title shown at the top of the box, the candidate names, and an optional pre\-selection.

```go
type Model struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="New"></a>
### func [New](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/components/picker/picker.go#L32>)

```go
func New(title string, names []string, current string, term theme.Size) Model
```

New creates a picker preselecting current if present in names; otherwise the first item is selected. Pass an empty title to render the picker without a title bar.

<a name="Model.Resize"></a>
### func \(\*Model\) [Resize](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/components/picker/picker.go#L49>)

```go
func (p *Model) Resize(term theme.Size)
```

Resize updates the centre region against which the picker is drawn.

<a name="Model.SelectedName"></a>
### func \(Model\) [SelectedName](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/components/picker/picker.go#L55>)

```go
func (p Model) SelectedName() string
```

SelectedName returns the name of the currently\-highlighted item, or "" if the cursor is out of range.

<a name="Model.Update"></a>
### func \(Model\) [Update](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/components/picker/picker.go#L64>)

```go
func (p Model) Update(msg tea.Msg) (Model, tea.Cmd)
```

Update processes a message and returns the new model \+ any command. Non\-key messages are ignored.

<a name="Model.View"></a>
### func \(Model\) [View](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/components/picker/picker.go#L87>)

```go
func (p Model) View() string
```

View renders the picker centred against totalW × totalH.

<a name="SelectedMsg"></a>
## type [SelectedMsg](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/components/picker/picker.go#L15>)

SelectedMsg fires when the user picks an item and confirms with Enter.

```go
type SelectedMsg struct{ Name string }
```
